title: SUNLU High Speed PLA Classic 3D Filament 1.75mm,600mm/s High Toughness PLA Filament,Matte Texture No-Tangling,Fit Most FDM Printers, Dimensional Accuracy +/- 0.02mm, 1kg Spool,(Grey)
features: ①【600 mm/s Ultra-High-Speed Printing】SUNLU PLA Classic achieves a maximum printing speed of 600 mm/s. This ultra-fast printing speed significantly reduces printing time, enhances efficiency, and eliminates layer defects.
②【Smooth Matte Finish】Our PLA Classic filament offers museum-quality velvety texture—gloss-free and particle-free—delivering a flawless surface and a satisfying matte finish.
③【Extremely Durable】SUNLU PLA Classic filament withstands drop, bend, and pressure tests, maintaining functional prototypes without cracks even after years of high-intensity use.

④【Triple Principle: Speed + Smoothness + Strength】SUNLU PLA Classic combines smooth flow, robust layered structure, and unique dream-like properties into one spool, offering a better printing experience.
⑤【Exclusive Macaron Colour Palette】SUNLU PLA Classic offers stunning pastel and macaron colour palettes, ideal for creative, aesthetic, and decorative 3D printing projects.
